metadata.rulesText: Put target creature card in a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. That creature is a black Zombie in addition to its other colors and types.
metadata.flavorText:
"Death is no excuse for disobedience."
—Liliana Vess

metadata.rulesText: Corrupt deals damage equal to the number of Swamps you control to target creature or player. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.
metadata.flavorText: There are things beneath the murk for whom the bog is a stew, a thin broth in need of meat.

metadata.rulesText:
Shroud (This creature can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Fading 3 (This creature enters the battlefield with three fade counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a fade counter from it. If you can't, sacrifice it.)
